classifications.title: Document the local issue check command
classifications.reason: Ready because this is a small documentation change for the command that already exists and stays inside the local loop boundary.
classifications.nextAllowedAction: Run the local check again or prepare a human-reviewed next step.
classifications.refusedAction: Do not change product code, call external trackers, schedule work, or dispatch agents yet.

classifications.title: Let the loop change product files after a ready classification
classifications.reason: Needs human approval because changing product files is outside the first-loop boundary in VISION.md.
classifications.stopReason: Human approval is required before this issue can move.
classifications.nextAllowedAction: Ask the human to approve, reject, or narrow the work.
classifications.refusedAction: Do not treat this issue as ready or change files for it.

classifications.title: Connect the local issue loop to GitHub issues
classifications.reason: Needs more input because the repository, auth model, issue mapping, write permissions, and failure behavior are not defined yet, and external trackers are out of scope for the first loop.
classifications.stopReason: More input is required before this issue can move.
classifications.nextAllowedAction: Ask for missing acceptance criteria or clearer scope.
classifications.refusedAction: Do not guess the missing requirements or start implementation.
